name: How do I handle medical care after work injury in Taylorsville?

mainEntity.name: How do I handle medical care after work injury in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use authorized docs; follow treatment; get switch approval.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Use employer-authorized providers initially; get written approval to switch or risk denied bills.[1][5] Follow all instructions to avoid suspension.[1] Key factors: Explain injury details to doctor for Form 123; keep records/copies.[2] Practical guidance: Attend every appointment, request reports, and communicate via employer insurer. Lawyer ensures proper care coverage.
